name: Legal & Compliance
description: Research, contract analysis, due diligence, and drafting for law firms and in-house legal teams. Every output is a draft for lawyer review — the system never sends, files, or advises autonomously.

agents.name: case-research
agents.description: Retrieves case-law authorities for a stated legal question, filtered by jurisdiction and point-in-time.

agents.name: contract-analyst
agents.description: Parses contracts, flags non-standard clauses, compares to house templates, identifies risk.

agents.name: case-summarizer
agents.description: Turns long judgments and briefs into structured, citable summaries.

agents.name: due-diligence
agents.description: Scope-by-scope DD against a target's data room and public registers.

agents.name: legal-drafter
agents.description: First-draft memos, letters, clause edits, and redlines — always returned as drafts for lawyer review.

agents.name: deadline-watcher
agents.description: Surfaces upcoming deadlines from calendar, docket, and matter records.

agents.name: client-comms
agents.description: Drafts client-facing language for lawyer review — never sent autonomously.

agents.name: intern-assistant
agents.description: Supervised junior assistant for trainees — not client-facing.

subagents.name: compliance-guardian
subagents.description: Non-bypassable review of every output against the firm's guardrails before release. Spawned automatically — cannot be bypassed by any agent.

subagents.name: citation-verifier
subagents.description: Verifies every authority cited in an output is real and accurately quoted. Runs on all READ and DRAFT outputs.

subagents.name: prompt-injection-sentry
subagents.description: Quarantines injection attempts in ingested documents before any agent sees the content.

guardrails: No jurisdiction outside matter scope without explicit flag
No output sent directly to clients — drafts only
Citation verification required on every authority cited
Privilege log maintained for all reviewed documents

inspirations.title: Review a contract
inspirations.prompt: Review this NDA and flag any non-standard clauses. Compare to our house template and summarise the top 3 risks in plain English.

inspirations.title: Case law research
inspirations.prompt: Find Singapore Court of Appeal cases on restraint of trade clauses in employment contracts from the last 5 years. Return structured authorities with citations.

inspirations.title: Due diligence on a target
inspirations.prompt: Run a scope 1 DD on this target company. Check public registers, flag any disclosed litigation, and list outstanding regulatory filings.

inspirations.title: Redline a contract
inspirations.prompt: Redline this services agreement against our standard template. Mark every deviation and suggest fallback language for the clauses we can't accept as-is.

inspirations.title: Deadline surface
inspirations.prompt: What contract renewals, limitation periods, and court deadlines are coming up in the next 30 days across all open matters?

inspirations.title: Matter chronology
inspirations.prompt: Build a chronology for matter ACME-2025-003 from all documents in the bundle. Output as a table with date, event, source document, and privilege flag.
